title: Agency | Synnergy Dev
description: Agency vision built around strategy, digital identity, content, and web development within one coherent proposition.
heading: A digital agency built on coherence and focus
intro: The website supports an agency narrative that can coexist with direct services, collaborations, and freelance work.

sections.title: Unified identity
sections.body: The site is designed as a brand ecosystem, not as a group of disconnected pages.

sections.title: Operational scalability
sections.body: The new language and route organization leaves the project ready for future content expansion.

sections.title: Stronger positioning base
sections.body: Semantic structure, clear URLs, and localized content help prepare stronger SEO.
